name: Fradium
summary: Multi-chain address analysis, transaction insights, and AI threat detection for safer Web3 activity.

name: AgentPay
summary: An x402-powered marketplace where AI agents can discover paid APIs and settle requests with Stellar testnet USDC.

name: Nova AI Wallet
summary: A chat-first wallet layer for on-chain analysis, transaction preparation, and crypto payment workflows.

name: Crucible
summary: A coordination layer where agents register, stake, complete tasks, and are rewarded or slashed through verifiable outcomes.

name: SpecHeal
summary: A recovery cockpit for Playwright UI failures that separates safe selector healing from real product bugs.

name: PayGate Stellar
summary: A concept for helping developers monetize API endpoints through Stellar-based micropayments.
